---
mode: ask
model: GPT-5.3-Codex
description: Update SEO metadata for one or multiple pages using existing project helpers.
---

Update SEO metadata for selected pages.

Inputs:

- Pages/routes:
- Title pattern:
- Meta description(s):
- Canonical URL(s) (optional):
- Open graph notes (optional):

Requirements:

- Reuse existing SEO helpers/components.
- Ensure values are consistent and non-duplicative.
- Keep modifications scoped to metadata concerns.
- Run build and report outcome.

Return:

1. Metadata updates by page.
2. Files changed.
3. Validation status.
